hero.title: Reliable legal support for individuals and businesses
hero.subtitle: Expert advice and representation in property and contract law and other key legal areas.
hero.micro: Confidential • No obligation on first contact

aboutMe.title: Professional and trustworthy
aboutMe.lead: The office has been operating independently since January 2023, following several years of experience at the Law Office of Damir Batarelo in Split (2018-2022).
aboutMe.bullet1: Graduated from the Faculty of Law in Split 2016
aboutMe.bullet3: My work is based on responsibility, confidentiality, and clear communication
aboutMe.focus: Property and land registry law, contract law, drafting/analysis of contracts, and representation in court and out-of-court proceedings.

services.title: Practice areas
services.desc: I provide legal services to individuals and legal entities in the following areas:

property.title: Property & land registry law
property.desc: Ownership, co-ownership, registrations and land registry regulation.
property.heroTitle: Protect your rights in property and land registry matters
property.heroDesc: We offer legal support in resolving ownership relations, contracts, and key property law situations.

contract.title: Contract law
contract.desc: Drafting and analysis of contracts and contractual disputes.
contract.heroTitle: Expert advice and representation in contract law
contract.heroDesc: We provide legal support in drafting and analyzing contracts, claims for damages, and other contractual relationships.

inheritance.title: Inheritance law
inheritance.desc: Counseling and representation in probate proceedings.
inheritance.heroDesc: We advise and represent clients in all phases of probate proceedings and ensure effective protection of their rights.

admin.title: Administrative law
admin.desc: Representation in proceedings before competent authorities.
admin.heroTitle: Representation in administrative proceedings and disputes
admin.heroDesc: We provide legal protection before competent authorities and courts in all types of administrative procedures.

enforcement.title: Enforcement law
enforcement.desc: Preparation and management of enforcement and debt collection.
enforcement.heroTitle: Preparation and management of enforcement proceedings
enforcement.heroDesc: We help with debt collection and provide legal support through all phases of enforcement proceedings.

labor.title: Labor law
labor.desc: Counseling and representation of employers and employees.
labor.heroTitle: Legal certainty for employers and employees
labor.heroDesc: We provide expert support in regulating employment relationships, protecting employee rights, and representation before competent authorities.

contact.title: Request a consultation
contact.desc: Send a brief description of your inquiry. I respond within 48 business hours.
contact.note: Prior arrangement is required for client reception.
contact.callHours: Outside working hours, we are available by phone exclusively for urgent cases.
contact.formSubtitle: I respond as soon as possible.
contact.consent: I consent to the processing of personal data for the purpose of responding to my inquiry.
contact.micro: Confidential • No obligation on first contact

footer.byAppt: Prior arrangement is required for client reception.
footer.copyright: Law Office Ivan Pavić. All rights reserved.
footer.subtitle: Law Office
footer.name: Ivan Pavić

controller.title: Data Controller
controller.body: This website is operated by Law Office Ivan Pavić. For privacy-related questions or requests, contact us at <email>ipavic933@gmail.com</email>.

collectedData.title: What We Collect
collectedData.body: Through the contact form or direct communication, we may collect your full name, email address, phone number, and the information you provide in your message.
collectedData.body2: When you use this website, certain technical data may also be collected automatically through analytics tools, such as your IP address, browser type, device type, access time, and visited pages.

purposeAndBasis.title: Purpose and Legal Basis
purposeAndBasis.bullet1: respond to inquiries and provide legal information,
purposeAndBasis.bullet2: prepare or perform legal services where applicable,
purposeAndBasis.bullet4: analyze website usage and improve its functionality and content.
purposeAndBasis.legalBasis: Legal bases may include consent, pre-contractual measures, performance of a contract, legitimate interests, and compliance with legal obligations.

cookiesAndAnalytics.title: Cookies and Analytics
cookiesAndAnalytics.body1: This website uses Google Analytics and Google Search Console.
cookiesAndAnalytics.body2: Google Analytics uses cookies to collect anonymous statistical data about how the website is used (e.g., number of visitors, most visited pages, time spent on pages). This data helps us understand user behavior and improve content and services.
cookiesAndAnalytics.body3: Google Search Console is used to monitor the technical health and search visibility of the website and does not enable direct identification of individual users.
cookiesAndAnalytics.body4: Data may be processed on servers outside the Republic of Croatia, including in the United States, in accordance with applicable data protection regulations.
cookiesAndAnalytics.body5: More detailed information about how Google processes data is available in Google's privacy policy.

retention.title: Data Retention
retention.body: We retain data only as long as necessary for the purpose for which it was collected, and where required by applicable legal or professional retention obligations.

sharing.title: Sharing of Data
sharing.body: We do not sell personal data. Data may be shared only with trusted service providers when necessary for website operation (including analytics providers), and with competent authorities where legally required.

rights.title: Your Rights
rights.body1: You may request access, correction, deletion, restriction, data portability, or object to processing.
rights.body2: You may also withdraw consent at any time, without affecting the lawfulness of processing based on consent before its withdrawal.

security.title: Security
security.body: We apply reasonable technical and organizational safeguards to protect personal data against unauthorized access, disclosure, alteration, or destruction.

externalLinks.title: External Links
externalLinks.body: This website may contain links to external services (for example map links). We are not responsible for the privacy practices of third-party websites.

contact.title: Contact
contact.body: For any privacy request, contact us at <email>ipavic933@gmail.com</email> or by phone at <phone>+385 95 529 7362</phone>.
